summary:
Upon examining typical developmental milestones for newborn structures including those related to joint formations such as temporomandibular joints' components from a general standpoint post-birth presentation,
the appearance is consistent regardless if described broadly enough under available options suggesting diversity among potential presentations captured visually during infancy stages immediately after parturition process concludes successfully leading us towards selecting \boxed{D}.
